name: Data-Driven Forward and Inverse Modeling of V-Beam Thermal Sensors
summary: arXiv:2607.09752v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents a machine learning framework for data-driven inverse design of V-beam thermal sensors. The goal is to determine the optimal sen...
description: arXiv:2607.09752v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents a machine learning framework for data-driven inverse design of V-beam thermal sensors. The goal is to determine the optimal sensor geometry: beam inclination angle, beam length and beam width that achieves a target displacement under a given temperature. The design should also provide the geometry with minimum structure volum...
author: Tudor Bartha, Radu Chiorean, Adrian Groza
